title: Insurance Underwriter
description: Citi is a leading global financial institution providing banking, investment, and advisory services to millions. You'll evaluate and manage risk across our global insurance portfolio.
responsibilities: Evaluate insurance applications and assess risk
Develop underwriting guidelines supporting business objectives
Manage claims and investigate coverage issues
Build relationships with agents and brokers

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Finance, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 2-4 years of underwriting, risk assessment, or insurance experience

benefits: Paid vacation, holidays, and personal days
